command: PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c 'from tau_coding.generated_ticket import ROUTABLE_AGENTS, validate_agent_handoff; assert "battle-scorekeeper" in ROUTABLE_AGENTS; p={"schema":"tau.agent_handoff.v1","github":{"repo":"grahama1970/tau","target":"local-proof"},"goal":{"goal_id":"g","goal_version":1,"goal_hash":"sha256:x"},"previous_subagent":"reviewer","context":{"summary":"s","artifacts":[]},"result":{"status":"PASS","summary":"s","evidence":[]},"rationale":"r","next_agent":{"name":"battle-scorekeeper","executor":"local","reason":"r"},"required_evidence":["e"],"stop_condition":"s"}; r=validate_agent_handoff(p, active_goal_hash="sha256:x"); assert r.ok, r.errors'
PYTHONPATH=src uv run pytest tests/test_generated_ticket.py tests/test_self_fix_repair_loop.py -q
